steps.title: Identify the key evidence pattern
steps.content: The conclusion claims Poland reported the greatest number of damaging insect species. To support this, the correct choice must show Poland's insect count exceeds both Italy's and Finland's — a direct numerical comparison across all three countries.

steps.title: Match the data comparison to the choices
steps.content: Choice B directly provides this evidence: Poland reported 105 damaging insect species, which is more than Italy (42) and Finland (28) reported. This demonstrates exactly what the conclusion claims — that Poland's insect species count surpasses the other countries. Choices A and C either mix categories or focus on fungi instead of insects, and D incorrectly cites tree counts rather than insect species numbers. That matches choice B — B is correct.
